text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We win the Unity Cup! Not only that, the hard
fight our team put up helped open Riko
Kashimoto's eyes and save her and her team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa congratulates us on our success
and gives us a voucher to a carrot BBQ.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also gives us a reward befitting our team
name, Blue Bloom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Riko Kashimoto and her students join us as the
festivities pick up. She greets me, this time as a
fellow trainer and with excitement for the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The road stretches ever onward before us.
<chrname> and I promise to keep
putting our best foot forward!
